author: DanielEstrada971102
body:
Update DT Trigger Phase 2 shower production with SL2 support, richer shower metadata, and a cleaner buffer model.

Key changes:

- Include SL2 shower primitives.
- Track the digis used to build shower properties.
- Refactor buffer handling and candidate containers.
- Switch shower candidate containers to vectors for multi-candidate support.
- Save hit dumps in ROOT format.
- Add a stream-like helper for log messages.
- Track wire, layer, and TDC constituents in shower objects.
- Extend `DTPrimitive` with orbit-correction support.
title: [L1T] DT Trigger Phase-2  Shower Tagging v1.2
